ddls:
CREATE TABLE "marketing_spend" (
  "spend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing spend record */,
  "week" TEXT /* Date of the week */,
  "branded_search_spend" REAL /* Spend on branded search advertising */,
  "nonbranded_search_spend" REAL /* Spend on non-branded search advertising */,
  "facebook_spend" REAL /* Spend on Facebook advertising */,
  "print_spend" REAL /* Spend on print advertising */,
  "ooh_spend" REAL /* Spend on out-of-home (OOH) advertising */,
  "tv_spend" REAL /* Spend on TV advertising */,
  "radio_spend" REAL /* Spend on radio advertising */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the marketing campaign */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the region */,
  "channel_description" TEXT /* Description of the marketing channel */,
  "creative_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the creative used in the campaign */,
  "spend_type" TEXT /* Type of spend (e.g., CPM, CPC, flat fee) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "week" TEXT /* Date of the week */,
  "sales" INTEGER /* Total sales for the week */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the region */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the product */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the store */,
  "customer_segment_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the customer segment */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_channel_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Marketing channel (e.g., branded search, non-branded search, Facebook) */,
  "correlation_coefficient" REAL /* Correlation coefficient between marketing spend and sales for the channel */,
  "regression_coefficient" REAL /* Regression coefficient between marketing spend and sales for the channel */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the region */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the product */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the store */,
  "customer_segment_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the customer segment */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
